title: PandemicLLM Reporting
text:
This Quarto project is a reporting layer over the artifacts already written to results/. It does not run forecasting code during render.
The first dashboard reads the current COVID outputs and the latest run metadata. Future tasks can be added as additional pages as long as their pipelines emit stable result files.

title: PandemicLLM Reporting
text:
Current Pages


COVID Dashboard
Reads results/output.csv, results/metrics.csv, results/gauge_output.csv, and the newest manifest under results/runs/.
Open the dashboard


Scaling Path
Add new pages under dashboards/ or reports/, and keep each task’s pipeline responsible for writing versioned artifacts into results/.

title: PandemicLLM Reporting
text:
Project Convention

Pipelines produce artifacts.
Quarto pages read artifacts.
Run metadata lives with the run under results/runs/<run_id>/.
Shared styling lives in styles.css.
